历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 60, 82, 67, 70, and 82 respectively, fluctuating within the 60–82 range, stabilizing in the 70–82 range in recent years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 82 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 38 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 43 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48, an increase of 5 students (about 11.6%) compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top national institution; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving neutral to negative incidents related to school management, campus safety, dormitories, and cafeterias); Douyin popularity is extremely high, ranking 2nd overall (high heat), with significant short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention for applications; Tsinghua has over 40 disciplines rated A- or above, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Clinical Medicine (A+), Law (A+), Architecture (A+), and Business Administration (A+), with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other science and engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 365,000, leading to a small rise in the competition base.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings fluctuating in the 70–82 range, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 5 students (alleviating competition), a slight increase in total candidates (intensifying competition), a neutral to negative school reputation but extremely high Douyin popularity (sustained application interest), based on the 2025 baseline of 82, calculated using supply-demand elasticity, the result is 82; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 88, with a range of 78–98.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine Category (including Clinical Medicine (Peking Union Medical College), Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician-Scientist) majors)
- Science Experimental Class (Science Majors) (including Cross-Disciplinary Engineering and other majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- None (Physics Category only has two enrollment major categories).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None (Physics Category only has two majors, Clinical Medicine Category has better rankings, Science Experimental Class is the university's lowest admission major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Tsinghua University only offers two enrollment majors in Hebei Province's Physics Category, with Clinical Medicine Category historically having better admission rankings than Science Experimental Class. For rankings within the predicted range of 78–98, it is recommended to primarily apply for Science Experimental Class; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤78), one can aim for Clinical Medicine Category. Both majors are Tsinghua's flagship programs, with A+/A+ disciplinary evaluations and extremely high social popularity.
